_comment: on_confirm — Operator formally confirms employment after driver accepts the job offer; sent by the operator platform (BPP) to the driver platform (BAP)
_comment_flow: Step 7 of 7 in the hiring arc. Follows confirm_offer_acceptance.json. This is the terminal happy-path message — hiring is confirmed and onboarding begins.
_comment_bap: Driver Platform (Shramik Connect) — receives this on_confirm
_comment_key_changes: hiringStage transitions to HIRING_CONFIRMED; onboardingStatus transitions to ONBOARDING_IN_PROGRESS; employeeId is issued; reportingManager and reportingDepot are set

fulfillmentAttributes.screeningNotes: Hiring confirmed. Driver Ramesh Kumar formally employed. Onboarding documentation to be completed by joining date.
fulfillmentAttributes.reportingManager: Mr. Anil Sharma — Divisional Traffic Manager, UPSRTC Hazratganj
fulfillmentAttributes.reportingDepot: UPSRTC Central Depot, Alambagh, Lucknow — PIN 226005

otherBenefits: Provident fund as per statutory requirement
Annual performance bonus up to one month salary
Medical insurance for self and family
offerAttributes.remarks: Joining date subject to completion of background verification.

orderAttributes.onboardingInstructions: Please report to UPSRTC HR office, Hazratganj on 2025-09-13 with original documents for verification. Bring Aadhaar, PAN, driving licence, and two passport-size photographs.
